Who we are
Every boundary dispute, every failed project, every title deed problem starts with bad data. We built Land Axis to end that.

Land Axis Limited is a professional land surveying, geospatial, and drone technology company delivering high-accuracy spatial data for infrastructure, transport, land development, and environmental projects across Kenya and the wider region. We integrate conventional surveying expertise with advanced UAV technologies to produce reliable, auditable outputs that meet national and international standards.

Work with us →
What we do
Our capabilities

Conventional surveying fused with advanced drone & geospatial technology.

01
Topographic Surveys
Detailed terrain mapping for engineering design, flood analysis, road corridors, and infrastructure planning. From small plots to hundreds of kilometres.
Engineering designContour mappingCorridor surveys
↗
02
Cadastral & Boundary Surveys
Land administration, title deed processing, subdivision, and right-of-way acquisition. We make your ownership legally undisputable.
Title deedsSubdivisionLand registry
↗
03
Engineering Surveys
Construction setting-out, as-built surveys, earthworks volume measurements, and geodetic control network establishment for projects of any scale.
Setting-outAs-builtEarthworks
↗
04
Power Line & Pipeline Surveys
Corridor mapping and route surveys for energy transmission lines, pipelines, and utility networks — supporting Kenya's infrastructure growth.
Energy corridorsUtility routesWayleaves
↗
05
GIS & Land Data Analysis
Spatial data processing, analysis, and custom reporting to power smarter land-use decisions, planning, and investment strategies.
Spatial analysisCustom reportingLand-use planning
↗
06
✦ Advanced technology
UAV Photogrammetry & Drone Mapping
High-resolution aerial mapping using industrial drone platforms. Orthomosaics, 3D point clouds, surface models, and volumetric analysis — fast and at scale.
Orthomosaics3D modelsVolume measurementLarge-area mapping
↗
07
✦ Advanced technology
Airborne LiDAR Survey
Dense point cloud generation through airborne LiDAR sensors. High-accuracy terrain modeling that penetrates vegetation — ideal for corridors, forests, and complex terrain.
Point cloudTerrain modellingVegetation penetration
↗
08
✦ Advanced technology
Thermal & Multispectral Inspection
Thermal imaging for infrastructure defect detection and asset assessment. Multispectral analysis for crop health, vegetation monitoring, and environmental rehabilitation.
Defect detectionCrop healthAsset assessment
↗
09
✦ Advanced technology
Agricultural Drone Spraying
Precision pesticide and fertilizer application using agricultural UAVs. Targeted, efficient, and GPS-tracked — dramatically reducing input costs and chemical waste.
Precision agricultureGPS-trackedInput efficiency
↗
Why work with us
Precision isn't a feature.
It's the product.
01

Centimetre-Level Accuracy

RTK/PPK GNSS systems and industrial LiDAR deliver survey-grade data that holds up in court, satisfies engineers, and never needs redoing.

02

Audit-Ready Every Time

Full data validation and accuracy checks before any deliverable leaves our hands. Every report is traceable, reviewable, and built to withstand scrutiny.

03

Technology Nobody Else Has

Airborne LiDAR, thermal inspection, multispectral analysis, and drone spraying — integrated capabilities that most Kenyan firms simply don't offer.

04

No Surprises on Price

We give you a clear, itemised quotation before any work begins. The number we quote is the number you pay. Transparent from day one.

How it works
From call to deliverable

A simple, transparent process built around your project — not ours.

STEP 01
Brief & Quote
Tell us your project. We respond within 2 hours with a clear, fixed quotation. No ambiguity, no obligation.
STEP 02
Site Mobilisation
Our team deploys with the right equipment — total station, GNSS, drone, LiDAR — selected specifically for your terrain and scope.
STEP 03
Data Acquisition
Fieldwork completed to ISK standards. Data is captured, cross-checked, and validated on-site before leaving the field.
STEP 04
Delivery & Support
Clean, auditable deliverables in your required format — DWG, PDF, GIS, or reports. We stay available for any post-delivery queries.
Who we serve
Built for the people
who build Kenya.
🛣
Road & Transport Agencies
KeNHA, county roads, contractors — corridor surveys, setting-out, and as-built documentation at scale.
🏗
Civil & Infrastructure Contractors
Reliable survey support from ground-breaking to completion. We're the partner that shows up and delivers.
📏
Consulting Engineers & Planners
We produce the spatial data your designs depend on — accurate, formatted to your specs, always on schedule.
🏛
Government & Municipalities
National ministries and county governments trust us for cadastral surveys, land valuation support, and GIS work.
🌿
Agriculture & Energy
Drone spraying, crop monitoring, power line corridors — precision geospatial for Kenya's food and energy future.
🏢
Real Estate & Developers
From land acquisition surveys to sectional title processing — turning raw land into legally registered, development-ready assets.
